---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Kerr"
---

## The Rev. Thomas Kerr

### Description

missionary in Melanesia

### Biography

There are details of his career, which has obscure patches, in the BLAIN BIOGRAPHICAL DIRECTORY of Anglican clergy in the South Pacific att www.anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/directory.pdf

### Letters

- Letter from May 6, 1862.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
